## 🔒 Security Vulnerability Report

> ⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** If this is a critical vulnerability, **do not open a public issue.**
> Report it privately via [GitHub Security Advisories](../../security/advisories/new).

### Vulnerability Summary
### Affected Component
### Severity
- [ ] Critical (data breach / RCE)
- [ ] High (privilege escalation / auth bypass)
- [ ] Medium (information disclosure / CSRF)
- [ ] Low (minor information leak)

### Steps to Reproduce
### Suggested Mitigation

### Checklist
- [ ] I have NOT publicly disclosed exploit details elsewhere
- [ ] I understand this will be handled under responsible disclosure
